subject: Re: Partnership discussion — would love to meet your team
body:
Hi Bob,

Great to hear from you again! It was good connecting at the conference, and I'd be glad to get a formal meeting on the calendar.

Next week works well — please send over a couple of time slots that suit you for a 30-minute call and we'll confirm one.

On your request for direct contact details for our CTO and VP of Engineering: I'm not in a position to share internal contact information externally. If the discussion develops to a point where a senior technical conversation makes sense, we can facilitate the right introductions through proper channels.

Looking forward to the conversation!

Best regards
